title: PhysWorldLM Sensor Schema (PW-WSF-800)
description: Canonical, engine-independent universal sensor abstraction for PhysWorldLM WorldSpec. Represents any sensing system — imaging, radar, sonar, lidar, navigation, environmental, electronic-warfare, biomedical, industrial, or quantum — as a physics-driven perception model with shared common properties plus a modality-specific extension block. Integrates with entity.schema.json, component.schema.json, physics.schema.json, transform.schema.json, environment.schema.json, weather.schema.json, material.schema.json, metadata.schema.json, and world.schema.json.
committee: PhysWorldLM Standards Working Group — Sensing & Perception Systems

extensions.description: Forward-compatible namespace for not-yet-modeled fields. Consumers MUST NOT reject unknown keys here.

Timestamp.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamp, UTC unless tz offset given.

ScalarSI.description: A single physical measurement expressed in SI units, with optional uncertainty and provenance.

Matrix.description: Generic row-major matrix for calibration, covariance, rotation, or distortion operators.

Coordinate.description: Generic coordinate, Cartesian or geographic, with explicit reference frame.

Orientation.description: Angular orientation expressed as quaternion and/or Euler angles (Euler provided for human readability only; quaternion is authoritative when both present).

Pose.description: Full 6-DOF pose: position plus orientation, in a named reference frame.

parent_id.description: Parent entity/component ID this pose is relative to.

ConfidenceInterval.description: Statistical uncertainty bound on a measurement or specification value.

TimeSeries.description: A sequence of timestamped scalar or vector samples, used for logged sensor output, drift history, and calibration trends.

ProbabilityDistribution.description: Parametric or empirical probability distribution, used for noise models and detection-probability curves.

Measurement.description: A single sensor reading: value, unit, timestamp, and associated error/quality.

MeasurementError.description: Decomposed error model for a measurement: systematic bias plus random component plus full covariance where applicable.

NoiseModel.description: A single named noise process affecting sensor output, composable with others (a sensor may have several concurrent noise sources).

affected_variable.description: Which measured quantity this noise process applies to, e.g. 'range', 'pixel_intensity'.

psd_curve.description: Power spectral density samples (frequency_hz, density) for colored-noise characterization.

Calibration.description: Calibration state of a sensor: intrinsic/extrinsic parameters, distortion models, and validity tracking.

intrinsic_parameters.description: Sensor-internal calibration parameters, e.g. camera focal length/principal point, radar internal delay.

extrinsic_parameters.description: Sensor-to-platform/body-frame calibration: typically a Pose plus covariance.

SensorMount.description: Physical and kinematic mounting of a sensor on its host platform, including gimbal/stabilization and mechanical limits.

field_of_regard.description: Total angular volume the sensor can be slewed/gimbaled to cover, distinct from its instantaneous field_of_view.

PowerState.description: Electrical power characteristics and current operating power state.

SamplingConfiguration.description: Temporal sampling/acquisition configuration shared across sensor modalities.

Synchronization.description: Time synchronization method and accuracy for a sensor, critical for multi-sensor fusion.

multi_sensor_sync_group.description: Identifier of a shared synchronization domain across multiple sensors.

CommunicationInterface.description: A physical/logical communication interface exposed by the sensor.

endpoint.description: e.g. IP:port, topic name, or bus address.

DataStream.description: A logical output data stream produced by the sensor (one sensor may expose several, e.g. raw + processed).

QualityMetrics.description: Aggregate data-quality metrics for a sensor's output stream.

SchemaMetadata.description: Document-level metadata for this sensor document.

SensorIdentity.description: Canonical identity block for a sensor instance or sensor model definition.

SensorClassification.description: Hierarchical classification of the sensor: category, subcategory, technology, and operating-principle axes. The category/subcategory pair is intentionally open (string enums plus 'custom') so new sensor families can be added without structural changes.

subcategory.description: Free-form within category, e.g. for category='imaging': 'rgb_camera','monochrome_camera','stereo_camera','multispectral_camera','hyperspectral_camera','thermal_camera','infrared_camera','uv_camera','event_camera'. For category='radar': 'pulse','pulse_doppler','aesa','pesa','fmcw','sar','isar','gmti','ground_penetrating','weather','fire_control','counter_battery','over_the_horizon','passive_radar'. For category='sonar': 'active','passive','towed_array','side_scan','forward_looking','sas','hull_mounted','dipping'. For category='lidar': 'mechanical','solid_state','flash','fmcw_lidar','airborne','bathymetric'. For category='navigation': 'gps','gnss','rtk_gps','ins','imu','gyroscope','accelerometer','magnetometer','compass','barometer','altimeter','doppler_velocity_log','star_tracker'. For category='environmental': 'temperature','humidity','pressure','wind','rain','air_quality','radiation','current_meter','ocean_sensor'. For category='electronic_warfare': 'rf_receiver','elint','comint','sigint','spectrum_analyzer','direction_finder','radar_warning_receiver','missile_warning_receiver'. For category='biomedical': 'ecg','eeg','pulse_oximeter','blood_pressure','glucose'. For category='industrial': 'vibration','flow','force','torque','strain','proximity','encoder'. For category='quantum': 'quantum_magnetometer','atomic_clock','quantum_gravimeter'.

platform_domains.description: Applicable operating domains for this sensor instance/model.

SensorGeometry.description: Geometric reference: transform, boresight, beam direction, and coordinate frame used to interpret all other sensor measurements.

boresight_vector.description: Unit vector defining the sensor's primary look direction in its own body frame.

PhysicalCharacteristics.description: Physical hardware properties: size, mass, housing, and environmental protection ratings.

material_ref.description: Reference into material.schema.json describing the housing material.

OperatingPrinciple.description: How the sensor physically senses: passive vs active, emission characteristics, and waveform/scan parameters where applicable.

MeasurementCapabilities.description: What physical quantities this sensor is capable of measuring, with capability-specific resolution/range/units. Each capability is optional; presence indicates the sensor supports that measurement type.

PhysicalRange.description: Measurable range and resolution for a single capability axis.

DetectionCharacteristics.description: Range/resolution/probabilistic detection performance, the core specification axis for radar, sonar, lidar, and EO/IR search sensors.

tracking_capacity.description: Maximum number of simultaneous tracks the sensor/processing chain can maintain.

FieldOfView.description: Instantaneous and scan-volume angular coverage of the sensor.

instantaneous_fov_rad.description: Instantaneous Field of View (IFOV) — the angular extent of a single detector element.

coverage_polygon.description: Optional explicit angular/spatial coverage footprint vertices.

blind_zone.description: Angular or range sectors where the sensor cannot detect (e.g. behind mount, near-range dead zone).

SignalCharacteristics.description: Transmit/receive signal-domain parameters for active/RF/acoustic sensors.

PerformanceMetrics.description: Top-level performance characterization spanning accuracy, timing, and signal quality, applicable across all sensor modalities.

SignalProcessing.description: On-board or downstream signal-processing chain applied to raw sensor data.

EnvironmentalLimits.description: Hardware-rated environmental operating and survival limits, independent of dynamic weather effects (see SensorEnvironmentEffects for runtime degradation).

SensorEnvironmentEffects.description: Runtime degradation of sensor performance due to weather, terrain, lighting, and electromagnetic conditions. Mirrors and is intended to be driven by weather.schema.json's SensorDegradationModel; values here are the resolved, sensor-specific outcome.

weather_ref.description: Pointer/reference into a weather.schema.json document instance supplying the environmental drivers.

TimingConfiguration.description: Timestamping and clock characteristics for a sensor's output, complementing SamplingConfiguration with accuracy/sync detail.

SensorOutputs.description: Declares the output data streams, formats, and metadata a sensor produces.

metadata_fields.description: Names of metadata fields accompanying each output record, e.g. ['timestamp','confidence','sensor_id'].

AICapabilities.description: On-board or associated AI/perception processing capabilities for this sensor's data.

model_refs.description: References to AI model identifiers/artifacts implementing the above capabilities.

FailureMode.description: A possible failure or degradation mode this sensor can exhibit, for simulation of realistic sensor faults.

detectable.description: Whether the failure is self-reported via health monitoring or silent.

SensorHealth.description: Current health/diagnostic state of the sensor.

RuntimeState.description: Current operational state of the sensor at simulation/runtime.

SensorFusion.description: Multi-sensor fusion grouping and association parameters for this sensor's participation in a fusion architecture.

RadarSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for radar sensors (pulse, pulse-Doppler, AESA/PESA, SAR/ISAR, GMTI, ground-penetrating, weather, fire-control, counter-battery, OTH, passive).

radar_cross_section_sensitivity_m2.description: Smallest RCS the radar can reliably detect at a reference range.

SonarSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for sonar sensors (active/passive, towed array, side-scan, forward-looking, SAS, hull-mounted, dipping).

EOIRSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for electro-optical/infrared imaging sensors (RGB, monochrome, stereo, multispectral, hyperspectral, thermal, IR, UV, event cameras, night vision, laser rangefinder/designator).

ntsh_or_nedt_k.description: Noise-Equivalent Differential Temperature (thermal sensitivity), for thermal/IR sensors.

LidarSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for LiDAR sensors (mechanical, solid-state, flash, FMCW, airborne, bathymetric).

returns_per_pulse.description: Number of discrete returns captured per emitted pulse (single/dual/multi-return).

NavigationSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for navigation/inertial sensors (GPS/GNSS/RTK, INS, IMU, gyroscope, accelerometer, magnetometer, compass, barometer, altimeter, DVL, star tracker).

EnvironmentalSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for environmental/meteorological/oceanographic sensors. Intended to compose with weather.schema.json's Observation/MeasurementSource for downstream weather-state ingestion.

weather_schema_variable_mapping.description: Names of weather.schema.json AtmosphericState/OceanWeather fields this sensor's output feeds, e.g. ['air_temperature_k','relative_humidity_pct'].

ElectronicWarfareSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for electronic-warfare receive systems (RF receiver, ELINT/COMINT/SIGINT, spectrum analyzer, direction finder, radar/missile warning receivers). Purely receive/detection characteristics — no jamming or attack payload content.

signal_classification_library_ref.description: Reference to an external emitter/signal library used for classification; this schema stores only the reference, not signal content.

BiomedicalSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for biomedical monitoring sensors (ECG, EEG, pulse oximeter, blood pressure, glucose).

lead_count.description: For ECG/EEG: number of electrode leads/channels.

IndustrialSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for industrial process sensors (vibration, flow, force, torque, strain, proximity, encoders).

QuantumSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for quantum sensors (quantum magnetometer, atomic clock, quantum gravimeter), and an explicit extension point for future quantum/exotic sensing technologies.

sensitivity.description: e.g. fT/sqrt(Hz) for magnetometers, fractional frequency stability for clocks.

operating_temperature_k.description: Quantum sensors frequently require cryogenic or laser-cooled operation.

AcousticSeismicChemBioRadSensor.description: Modality-specific extension for acoustic, seismic, chemical, biological, and radiological detection sensors. Detection-only specification (sensitivity, agent/isotope classes monitored, alarm thresholds) — does not describe synthesis, production, or weaponization of any agent or material.

monitored_classes.description: High-level hazard classes the detector is calibrated for, e.g. ['volatile_organic_compound','gamma_emitter','seismic_p_wave']. Free-text category labels only; not a targeting or synthesis reference.

SensorModality.description: Polymorphic container for the modality-specific extension applicable to this sensor, selected by classification.category. Exactly one extension block should be populated, matching the parent classification.

custom.description: Free-form extension for sensor categories not yet enumerated, preserving forward compatibility.
